wins: Strong organic growth in 2023 with $289 billion in net inflows
Successful acquisition of GIP, creating a $150 billion infrastructure platform
Positive fourth quarter results with 8% higher EPS and 9% higher operating income
Significant momentum in ETF inflows with $186 billion in net inflows
Strategic reorganization and cost management leading to improved operating margins
risks: Market volatility and potential for lower base fee growth in 2024
Uncertainty around the effectiveness of the GIP integration
Potential impact of higher interest rates on investment performance
Competition in the private markets and ETF space
Regulatory and tax changes affecting financial results
